candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue line at the top of the income statement; best semantic match for sales/revenue.
Also a revenue total and numerically identical to Operating revenues; useful as fallback if labels vary by year.
This is COGS, not revenue.
Non-operating finance income, not revenue from operations.
Interest income, not operating revenue.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Owners of Parent Company - Total
candidates.why: Bottom-line comprehensive income, not revenue.
Balance sheet liability, not the income statement revenue line.

variables.notes: Selected the operating revenue label first, with Total Revenue as fallback priority label. Do not sum them.

candidates.why: Debt issuance cost, not cost of goods/services sold.
Direct cost-of-revenue line corresponding to COGS/cost of sales.

variables.notes: Best direct match for cost of sales/cost of revenues.

candidates.why: Explicit overhead/administrative expense row above operating profit; best SG&A-type line.
Component of Administrative Expenses, but when explicit SG&A/admin row exists and is populated, prefer only the broader explicit row.
Headcount metric, not an expense row.

variables.notes: Per rule, explicit populated SG&A/admin row exists, so selected only that row. Excluded Other expenses, depreciation, impairment, and component/subtotal rows.
No dedicated research and development expense line is visible in the provided income statement.

candidates.why: Net finance cost total, but underlying recurring components are available so prefer components to avoid mixing in aggregates.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Direct recurring interest expense line; strongest match for XINT.
Likely recurring additional finance costs and part of finance costs; acceptable alongside interest expense when using granular components.
Minority interest in earnings, not finance cost.
Liability balance, not income statement interest expense.
Equity balance, not finance cost.
Equity balance, not finance cost.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest

variables.notes: Used granular recurring finance-cost components instead of total Finance costs. Excluded bank fees on early repayment of debt as likely non-recurring.

candidates.row_label: Loss on derivative contracts reclassified from equity
candidates.why: OCI/reclassification item, not balance sheet equity.
Income allocation line, not book equity on the balance sheet.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Owners of Parent Company - Total
candidates.why: Income statement comprehensive income, not balance sheet equity.
Owner/shareholder equity line that excludes non-controlling interest, as confirmed by Total equity being higher by the NCI amount.
Includes non-controlling interest, so less preferred when separate NCI line exists.

variables.notes: Preferred owner/shareholder equity because separate non-controlling interest is reported; this avoids double counting when BE + MIB is computed.

candidates.why: Income attribution line, not balance sheet minority equity.
Direct balance sheet non-controlling interest line; strongest match for MIB.
Equivalent balance sheet label and possible alternate naming.
Income statement attribution line, not the preferred balance sheet minority equity line.

variables.notes: Selected the balance sheet non-controlling interest line for minority interest.
